testcase.name: App > renders the login page and signs in to the workspace
App > creates a new chat and renders the response card hierarchy
App > creates a chat from the home workspace on first submission and activates the thread route
App > renders streamed execution trace steps before completion
App > falls back to synchronous submission when streaming is unavailable
App > collapses and expands the history panel from the rail
App > shows inline composer validation for too many subtasks
App > loads direct thread routes and redirects missing threads home
App > blocks creating a sixth thread from the sidebar
App > blocks submissions when a chat already has three task flows
App > auto-scrolls the active thread when a later response is appended
App > navigates to the admin page and reveals passwords only for session-created users
App > keeps admin navigation hidden for standard users
